description: Page explicitly documents a layout shift — visually shows a red banner pushed the heading down
scenario_goal: Assess visual stability and polish of a page known to have layout shift
instruction: Evaluate visual polish and UI consistency. Note any signs of instability.

labels.rationale: Banner + content look ok but the screenshot captures the post-shift state; critic may or may not perceive instability from a still.
Layout is simple, consistent within the page; no obvious inconsistency from a single screenshot.
